Records.description: The integrals in this paper are given as analytic functions in $d$ dimensions, so that all orders in $\varepsilon$ are covered. The common prefactor to all integrals is $(4\pi)^{(4 - d)/2} (\Gamma(3 - d/2) \Gamma^2(d/2 - 1))/\Gamma(d - 3)$. Be aware that all these integrals have at least one off-shell leg.

Results.resultTeX: \frac{M_3^{-2} \left(2 H\left(\frac{1}{1-M_2^2 M_3^{-2}},\frac{1}{W_2^-+1}\,;1\right)-4 H\left(0,\frac{1}{W_2^-+1}\,;1\right)-2 H\left(\frac{1}{1-M_2^2 M_3^{-2}},\frac{1}{W_2^++1}\,;1\right)+4 H\left(0,\frac{1}{W_2^++1}\,;1\right)+2 \log \left(M_1^2 M_2^{-2}\right) \log \left(-W_2^-\right)+\log ^2\left(-W_2^-\right)-2 \log \left(M_1^2 M_2^{-2}\right) \log \left(-W_2^+\right)-\log ^2\left(-W_2^+\right)\right)}{2 \varepsilon \left(W_2^--W_2^+\right)} + \cdots
